revoke.meta.title: Revoke Approvals — take back token access
revoke.meta.description: Find and revoke the unlimited token approvals you've granted across many chains. ERC-20, NFTs (ERC-721/1155) and Permit2 — public RPC, non-custodial, batch revoke in one signature.
revoke.title: Revoke Approvals
revoke.subtitle: See every contract that can still move your tokens and NFTs — and shut off the risky ones in one click.
revoke.safety.heading: Why revoke?
revoke.safety.detail: When you use a DEX, marketplace or bridge, you approve a contract to spend your tokens — often with an unlimited allowance that stays active forever. If that contract is later exploited, your funds are at risk. Revoking sets the allowance back to zero. Your wallet only signs the revoke transactions; this tool never holds your keys or funds.
revoke.network.label: Network
revoke.note.customBiubiu: The built-in passkey wallet can't send on custom networks. Connect an injected or paired wallet to revoke here.
revoke.scan.error: Couldn't scan this network. Try rescanning, or switch RPC in settings.
revoke.scan.emptyHint: This scan covers a curated list of mainstream tokens, NFTs and spenders, plus anything you've added. If you approved a niche token or protocol, add it as a custom token or spender and rescan.
revoke.scan.noUnlimited: No unlimited approvals — only capped ones.
revoke.scan.coverage: Fast scan of mainstream tokens, NFTs and known spenders — plus your custom additions. It doesn't crawl your whole history, so a niche or brand-new approval may not show. Approved something unusual? Add it as a custom token or spender to include it.
revoke.addToken.title: Add a custom token
revoke.addToken.fetchFailed: Couldn't read this token. Check the address and network.
revoke.addToken.footnote: The token is saved in your browser for this network and included in every scan.
revoke.addSpender.title: Add a custom spender
revoke.addSpender.footnote: We'll check every token against this spender on the selected network.
revoke.addNetwork.title: Add a custom network
revoke.addNetwork.footnote: Uses Multicall3 at the standard address. Saved in your browser.
revoke.addNetwork.searchHint: Search any of 2,000+ EVM chains — name, symbol, explorer and RPC are filled in automatically.
revoke.addNetwork.searchPlaceholder: Search any EVM chain by name or ID
revoke.addNetwork.noResults: No chains found. Check the name or chain ID.
revoke.addNetwork.needRpc: This chain has no public RPC — paste one above to add it.
revoke.addNetwork.addFailed: Couldn't add this network. Please try again.
